Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop

Interface BlockProp<T>

Type Parameters:
T - container type
All Known Implementing Classes:
BooleanBlockProp, ByteBlockProp, IntBlockProp, ListStringBlockProp, StringBlockProp
@AvailableSince("0.0.46") public interface BlockProp<T>
Represents a block metadata. The metadata is usually specific to the block type, and is used to preserve block state (such as direction) in the schematic format.
See Also:
  • BlockPropFormat

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static class 
    BlockProp.Legacy
    Contains legacy (1.8) block data keys

    • value

      T value()
      Get the value encapsulate in this block prop
      Returns:
